  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"ForecastSummaryInput object that you want to forecast summary report for","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"programId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"versionId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"reportView":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"ForecastSummaryInput_ReportView"}}},"required":true}}
